title: Software Developer
description:
Full Stack Software Developer (ASP.NET MVC, SQL Server, React) \\- Job DescriptionAbout the Company

With a strong focus on quality, scalability, and customer satisfaction, CES has established itself as a trusted partner in digital transformation initiatives. Our team comprises talented professionals committed to developing cutting\\-edge applications that meet the evolving needs of our clients. We foster a collaborative and inclusive work environment that encourages continuous learning and professional growth. At CES, we believe in leveraging the latest technologies to create impactful solutions that drive success for our partners and stakeholders.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a passionate and experienced Full Stack Software Developer to join our dynamic development team. The ideal candidate will possess deep expertise in ASP.NET MVC, SQL Server, and React, with a proven track record of building high\\-performance, user\\-centric web applications. This role involves designing, developing, and maintaining scalable backend solutions, as well as collaborating closely with front\\-end developers and UI/UX designers to deliver seamless user experiences. The successful candidate will play a critical role in enhancing our enterprise web applications, ensuring they are robust, secure, and highly responsive. Exposure to cloud platforms such as AWS and databases like MongoDB is considered an advantage. The role offers an exciting opportunity to work on innovative projects, contribute to technical strategy, and advance your career in a fast\\-paced environment.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess between 3 to 6 years of relevant experience in software development, with a strong emphasis on backend and full\\-stack development. Extensive hands\\-on experience with ASP.NET MVC and SQL Server is essential. Familiarity with .NET Core, RESTful API design, and integration is highly desirable. Candidates should have experience working with version control systems such as Git, and familiarity with CI/CD pipelines to ensure efficient deployment workflows. Knowledge of AWS cloud services and MongoDB will be considered advantageous. Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with cross\\-functional teams are critical for success in this role. A proactive attitude towards learning and adopting new technologies is highly valued.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop and maintain scalable, secure, and high\\-performance backend solutions using ASP.NET MVC and SQL Server.
* Collaborate with front\\-end developers, UI/UX designers, and product managers to ensure seamless integration of APIs and user interfaces.
* Design, implement, and optimize RESTful APIs to support front\\-end functionalities.
* Stay updated with emerging trends and best practices in backend development and incorporate innovative solutions into projects.
* Participate in code reviews, testing, and documentation to ensure code quality and maintainability.
* Drive continuous improvement in development processes, tools, and workflows to enhance team productivity.
* Contribute to technical planning, architecture discussions, and project estimations.
* Support deployment and operational activities, including troubleshooting and resolving production issues.


**Benefits**
 CES offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support our employees' well\\-being and professional growth. This includes competitive salary packages, health insurance coverage, and paid time off. We provide opportunities for continuous learning through training programs, certifications, and participation in industry conferences. Our flexible work arrangements promote work\\-life balance, and we foster a collaborative environment that encourages innovation and creativity. Additionally, employees have access to modern tools and technologies to facilitate their work and development. CES is committed to recognizing and rewarding excellence, providing a motivating environment where talent can thrive.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 CES is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. Our hiring practices are rooted in fairness and merit, and we strive to provide equal employment opportunities to all qualified candidates. We believe that diverse teams drive innovation and are essential to our continued success.

title: Software Engineer- .Net, C#
description:
Let me tell you about the role

If you’re energized by building modern, reliable, user centric solutions and want your work to make a visible impact, this role will keep you challenged, growing, and at the heart of meaningful innovation. This role may require some overlap or occasional US working hours.

**Skills That Set You Apart**

description:

As a pioneer in the fintech industry, Intuit leverages cutting\\-edge technology and data\\-driven insights to deliver impactful solutions that foster financial health and growth.

 Come join our collaborative and creative group of AI scientists and machine learning engineers for Intuit Foresight! As an AI Scientist, you will be instrumental in designing and building the next generation of AI systems that directly impact our customers. Your work will involve deploying advanced machine learning models in AI\\-native applications, utilizing a broad spectrum of algorithms from analytical techniques to deep learning and generative AI. This role offers a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of artificial intelligence, contributing to innovative solutions that enhance financial management and decision\\-making for millions of users worldwide.

Hands\\-on experience with machine learning techniques such as classification, regression, decision trees, deep neural networks, and reinforcement learning is essential. Additionally, familiarity with large\\-scale AI evaluations, experimentation methods, and statistical analysis will be highly valuable.
   

  

**Responsibilities**

**Benefits**
